description: CompositionIndigo blue round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, ribbed collar, and graphic and flock print on chestFittingRegularWash care Machine wash with warm water of 40 degrees Wash inside out with like colours Do not bleach Dry in shade Do not iron on print Let  your cool attitude rub off on your gang this summer with this round neck tee from mr. men. While the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and dry all day, the velvetty touch on parts of the print speaks volumes about your cool attitude. A great casual wear, this t-shirt looks best with jeans and casual lifestyle footwear.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
